summary: Matched and implemented a large batch of Sheik Up-B/SpecialHi routines in ftSk_SpecialHi.c, replacing many placeholder decomp markers with C implementations. The work reused Gelatart and kipcode66 decomp.me scratches, added needed fighter/common/collision/vector includes, and adjusted ftSeakAttributes field typing/layout to support matching SpecialAirHi physics and collision logic. One attempted config/GALE01/build.sha1 path change was questioned in review and acknowledged as an accidental dtk shasum/setup oversight to be reverted.
what_changed: Implemented ftSk_SpecialHiStart_0_Anim and ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_0_Anim to transition when ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining returns zero.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialHiStart_0_Phys as a call to ft_80084F3C and ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_0_Phys using ftSeakAttributes x30/x34 with ftCommon_8007D494 and ftCommon_8007D268.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialHiStart_0_Coll to check ft_80082708 against GA_Ground and transition via ftSk_SpecialHi_80113324.

Implemented helper transition routines ftSk_SpecialHi_80113324 and ftSk_SpecialHi_80113390, including ftCommon ground/air state setup, Fighter_ChangeMotionState calls, and accessory4_cb assignment to fn_80112ED8.

Implemented ftSk_SpecialHiStart_1_Anim and ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Anim by decrementing Sheik move-state counters and branching to ftSk_SpecialHi_80113EAC or ftSk_SpecialHi_80113F68 when the counter reaches zero.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialHiStart_1_Phys as a call to ftCommon_8007CB74.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialHiStart_1_Coll with ground/air collision checks using coll_data.env_flags and transitions to ftSk_SpecialHi_8011374C, ftSk_SpecialHi_80113EAC, or ftSk_SpecialHi_80113F68.

Implemented ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Coll with ledge/ground checks, ft_CheckGroundAndLedge, ftCo_8009A134, ftCliffCommon_80081298, env_flags masks, and lbVector_AngleXY comparisons against Sheik attribute-derived thresholds.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialHi_Phys as a call to ft_80084F3C.
Added includes in ftSk_SpecialHi.c for ftSk_SpecialHi.h, ft_081B.h, ftcliffcommon.h, ftcommon.h, ftCo_Pass.h, and lbvector.h.
Changed ftSeakAttributes x30 and x34 from s32 to f32, changed x3C to f32, and split part of data_filler_1 into explicit fields x50, x54, x58, and x5C while shrinking the filler.
A build.sha1 path change appeared in review but was not part of the final changed_files list; review indicates it was an accidental local tooling/config artifact.
smart_moves: Leveraged existing decomp.me scratch work instead of starting from raw assembly for every routine, explicitly citing scratch URLs and authorship where known.
Used matching pressure from implemented SpecialAirHi physics/collision routines to refine ftSeakAttributes types and expose previously hidden fields.
Kept comments documenting why x30/x34 and x3C were treated as f32 and why x50-x5C were added, making future struct work easier to audit.
Broke the work into small state functions that mirror the game state machine: animation completion, IASA stubs, physics, collision, and helper transitions.
Added targeted includes for the newly referenced common fighter, ledge, pass, and vector APIs rather than relying only on unresolved placeholders.
Preserved evidence that ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Coll matched in scratch but may not fully match in-tree yet, avoiding overclaiming.
decomp_lessons: For fighter special move files, matching one physics or collision routine can reveal dat_attrs field types and offsets needed by adjacent routines.

If a scratch requires changing character attribute fields from integer to float, verify whether the same fields are consumed by vector/angle/velocity code before committing broader struct layout changes.
Collision-state functions often need both env_flags mask checks and explicit ground/ledge helper calls; include ftcliffcommon, ftCo_Pass, and lbvector when those helpers enter the decomp.
State-transition helpers commonly preserve cur_anim_frame and set accessory callbacks after Fighter_ChangeMotionState; matching these helpers can unlock multiple animation/collision wrappers.
Documenting scratch provenance in comments is useful when importing partially matched or collaborator-derived decomp work.
Tool-generated config artifacts such as build.sha1 should be reviewed carefully; dtk shasum outputs may use orig/GALE01/sys/main.dol while the project expects build/GALE01/main.dol.
naming_conventions: Existing address-style internal helper names were retained, such as ftSk_SpecialHi_80113324, ftSk_SpecialHi_80113390, ftSk_SpecialHi_8011374C, ftSk_SpecialHi_801137C8, ftSk_SpecialHi_80113838, ftSk_SpecialHi_80113A30, ftSk_SpecialHi_80113EAC, and ftSk_SpecialHi_80113F68.
Ground and aerial variants follow the established ftSk_SpecialHiStart_* versus ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_* naming pattern.
State suffixes follow the fighter convention Anim, IASA, Phys, and Coll.
Unidentified static functions remain address-named or fn_-prefixed, for example fn_80112ED8 and fn_80113038.
ftSeakAttributes fields remain offset-style names such as x30, x34, x3C, x50, x54, x58, and x5C until semantic names are known.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used decomp.me scratches by Gelatart and kipcode66 as matching sources for individual routines.
Matched simple physics wrappers by reducing them to direct calls such as ft_80084F3C and ftCommon_8007CB74.
Adjusted struct field types to f32 for x30, x34, and x3C to satisfy codegen in SpecialAirHi physics/collision contexts.
Introduced explicit unused stack storage in ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Coll, shown as s32 unused[6], likely to influence stack layout/codegen.
Used float constants ftSk_Init_804D9660, ftSk_Init_804D9664, ftSk_Init_804D9670, and ftSk_Init_804D9674 in comparisons and Fighter_ChangeMotionState arguments.
Retained a comment around an m2c artifact in ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Coll: unknown instruction cror eq, gt, eq, indicating that this region had known comparison/codegen sensitivity.
Used env_flags masks 0x3F, 0xFC0, and 0x6000 with wall/ceiling normals and lbVector_AngleXY to express collision response conditions.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: Questioned why the sha1 path changed from build/GALE01/main.dol to orig/GALE01/sys/main.dol.

review_feedback.author: Gelatart
review_feedback.comment: Explained the path change was likely an oversight from running a dtk shasum command from a dtk-template guide and missing the correction step.

review_feedback.author: Gelatart
review_feedback.comment: Noted confusion caused by a test complaining about sha1 setup and planned to commit a fix reverting the path.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.comment: Left an approving thanks comment: Nice, thanks!

follow_up_queries: Check whether ftSk_SpecialAirHiStart_1_Coll eventually became fully matching in a later PR.
Audit later ftSeakAttributes refinements to see if x30, x34, x3C, x50, x54, x58, and x5C received semantic names.
Search for remaining placeholder markers in src/melee/ft/chara/ftSeak/ftSk_SpecialHi.c after PR 1606.
Look for other PRs that reused kipcode66 Sheik Up-B decomp.me scratches.
Verify that config/GALE01/build.sha1 remained at the expected build/GALE01/main.dol path after this review.
